title: Bostik Leather Adhesive Glue 20 millilitre 381513 (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
Adhesive glue for bonding leather materials
Suitable for repairing shoes, bags, and other leather items
Easy to apply with precision tip.
description: From the manufacturer Revive your leather goods with Bostik Leather Repair Glue Bring new life to your leather items with Bostik Leather Repair Glue. This high-performance adhesive is perfect for repairing and bonding leather and imitation leather, ensuring a strong, flexible, and durable bond. Perfect for every leather repair Whether you're fixing a beloved leather jacket, repairing a handbag, or mending a pair of shoes, Bostik Leather Repair Glue is your go-to solution. Its versatility makes it ideal for use on leather, imitation leather, and other materials, ensuring your items look as good as new. Effortless application for professional results Using Bostik Leather Repair Glue is simple. Ensure surfaces are clean and dry. Apply a thin layer of glue to both surfaces and press them together firmly. Allow the glue to dry for a few minutes before handling. For best results, let the bond cure for 24 hours. Clean tools with warm soapy water immediately after use. Advantages STRONG BOND: Provides a robust and long-lasting bond for leather repairs. FLEXIBLE FORMULA: Maintains flexibility, preventing cracks and breaks. EASY TO APPLY: Simple application process for quick repairs. FAST DRYING: Dries quickly, allowing you to use your items sooner. VERSATILE USE: Suitable for leather, imitation leather, and other materials.
